refnamediv.refpurpose: Estimate a smoothed stereo disparity map.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: disparity = imstereosgbm(left, right) disparity = imstereosgbm(left, right, numDisparities, blockSize)

listitem.para: Rectified left and right stereo images with matching sizes.
Number of disparities to search. Default follows imstereobm.
Odd matching block size. Default follows imstereobm.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Provides a compact SGBM-style workflow by computing local block disparity and smoothing the result. It is an image-space macro baseline, not a replacement for a full OpenCV SGBM optimizer. Border pixels where the disparity search window cannot fit are returned as zero before smoothing.

refsection.title: Examples
